section.name: Development builds
section.p: BreakTest publishes official releases on GitHub. Development builds are produced by pull requests and branch builds when project automation is enabled. They are interim builds that are untested and unsupported. Use at your own risk.

note.b: Development builds should not be used in production.

section.p: Use GitHub Actions for current CI runs and Download BreakTest for official releases.
BreakTest release builds consist of binary and source archives:

ul.li: breaktest-{version}.zip - binary distribution in ZIP format
breaktest-{version}.tgz - binary distribution in TAR GZIP format
breaktest-{version}_src.zip - source distribution in ZIP format
breaktest-{version}_src.tgz - source distribution in TAR GZIP format

section.p: Each official release asset includes a SHA-512 checksum.

Unpack the bundle and use it as you would use a release, but keep in mind that development builds may include incomplete features or regressions. Report BreakTest-specific problems in the BreakTest issue tracker.
